pageContext.name: Superman Black Suit
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios are proud to announce the latest from the Legacy Replica 1:4 line - Superman Black Suit! This DC Collectible Superman Statue is limited edition and based on the references from Zack Snyder's Justice League.   DC Comics fans, don't miss your chance to add Superman Black Suit 1:4 Legacy Replica Statue to your DC collection.
